title: vochysia tucanorum var. elongata
intro: Vochysia tucanorum var. elongata, also known as the 'Long-leaf Vochysia', is a plant species belonging to the family Vochysiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, inflammation, and infections. The Long-leaf Vochysia is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, providing health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Vochysia tucanorum var. elongata include teas and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
